issue_summary: Reduced the number of condition checks for disabling locks. Documented the use of 'disableLocks' system property in class Javadoc.
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Straight forward implementation of Directory as a directory of files.
 * If the system property 'disableLocks' has the String value of "true", lock
 * creation will be disabled.
 *
 * @see Directory
 * @author Doug Cutting
 */
